extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won the sprint after taking teammate's bike in final 3km, overcoming mechanical and intermediate sprint anger between ROGLIČ and EVENEPOEL
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ wheelsucked EVENEPOEL on intermediate sprint break attempt, triggering anger but neutralizing GC rival's bonus second attack.
Bahrain chased SOLER despite no time gap threat, protecting LANDA's exact-same-time GC position from intermediate sprint seconds.
Jumbo-Visma initiated intermediate sprint at 8.4km go for ROGLIČ bonus, baiting EVENEPOEL into energy expenditure before final sprint.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: wasted energy arguing and attacking intermediate sprint for bonus seconds instead of conserving for stage win attempt
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: maintained composure to win sprint after bike change inside 3km, suggesting exceptional mental resilience under pressure
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: attacked solo for intermediate sprint seconds to jump LANDA in GC via tiebreaker, showing tactical awareness
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: Bahrain burned team resources chasing SOLER to protect exact-same-time GC position from bonus second leapfrog
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: tactically refused to work with EVENEPOEL on break attempt, forcing rival to waste energy while protecting 11-second GC lead
